summary: Phase 1 features testing complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend code review verified all Phase 1 features are implemented correctly. UI testing limited due to wizard requiring AI analysis (Step 3) before accessing Steps 4-6.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works (test@example.com / test123456)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-image endpoint works (multipart file upload)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-image rejects invalid file types (400)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-image requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/video/assemble accepts addSubtitles: true field
Backend: POST /api/video/assemble accepts lyrics: string field
Backend: POST /api/video/assemble accepts hookTexts: array field
Backend: GET /api/projects returns project list
Backend: POST /api/projects creates project with lyrics field
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id} returns lyrics field
Backend: POST /api/ai/animate-image endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/settings returns imageProvider and videoProvider
Backend: GET /api/settings/api-keys returns key status
Code Review: Step4 has data-testid='upload-images-button' (line 272)
Code Review: Step4 has data-testid='reference-toggle-{index}' (line 377)
Code Review: Step4 shows 'Uploaded' badge for uploaded images (line 358)
Code Review: Step4 Generate Images button shows '(with references)' when references selected (line 305)
Code Review: Step5 has data-testid='animate-all-button' (line 240)
Code Review: Step5 has data-testid='approve-all-button' (line 260)
Code Review: Step5 individual animate/approve buttons exist (lines 375-409)
Code Review: Step6 shows all selected hooks (lines 174-175)
Code Review: Step6 has data-testid='toggle-subtitles' (line 240)
Code Review: Step6 shows line count and 'evenly timed' description (lines 222-231)
Code Review: Step6 passes addSubtitles and lyrics to API (lines 44-45)
Code Review: Backend FFmpeg uses filter_complex with proper escaping (line 2108)
Code Review: Backend drawtext uses enable='between(t\\,X\\,Y)' with escaped commas (lines 2071, 2094)
Code Review: Backend subtitle lines exclude section headers [Verse], [Chorus] (line 2078)
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 1 features are correctly implemented in the code
FFmpeg filter_complex properly escapes commas in between() function
Subtitle filtering correctly excludes section headers like [Verse 1], [Chorus]

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI testing limited by wizard flow

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features verified via backend tests and code review. UI testing of Steps 4-6 requires completing Step 3 (AI analysis) which needs a valid OpenAI API key. Test user has dummy key so AI analysis fails. To fully test UI: 1) Use a real OpenAI API key, or 2) Mock the AI analysis response, or 3) Pre-populate project with concept data. All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented.
